001// Copyright (c) Choreo contributors
002
003package choreo.auto;
004
005import choreo.Choreo;
006import choreo.Choreo.TrajectoryCache;
007import choreo.Choreo.TrajectoryLogger;
008import choreo.trajectory.SwerveSample;
009import choreo.trajectory.Trajectory;
010import choreo.trajectory.TrajectorySample;
011import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
012import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.DriverStation;
013import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.RobotBase;
014import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.event.EventLoop;
015import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
016import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Commands;
017import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Subsystem;
018import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
019import java.util.HashMap;
020import java.util.List;
021import java.util.Optional;
022import java.util.function.BooleanSupplier;
023import java.util.function.Consumer;
024import java.util.function.Supplier;
025
026/**
027 * A factory used to create {@link AutoRoutine}s and {@link AutoTrajectory}s.
028 *
029 * @see <a href="https://choreo.autos/choreolib/auto-routines">Auto Routine Docs</a>
030 */
031public class AutoFactory {
032  static final AutoRoutine VOID_ROUTINE =
033      new AutoRoutine("VOID-ROUTINE") {
034        private final EventLoop loop = new EventLoop();
035
036        @Override
037        public Command cmd() {
038          return Commands.none().withName("VoidAutoRoutine");
039        }
040
041        @Override
042        public Command cmd(BooleanSupplier _finishCondition) {
043          return cmd();
044        }
045
046        @Override
047        public void poll() {}
048
049        @Override
050        public void reset() {}
051
052        @Override
053        public Trigger running() {
054          return new Trigger(loop, () -> false);
055        }
056      };
057
058  /** A class used to bind commands to events in all trajectories created by this factory. */
059  public static class AutoBindings {
060    private HashMap<String, Command> bindings = new HashMap<>();
061
062    /** Default constructor. */
063    public AutoBindings() {}
064
065    /**
066     * Binds a command to an event in all trajectories created by the factory using this bindings.
067     *
068     * @param name The name of the event to bind the command to.
069     * @param cmd The command to bind to the event.
070     * @return The bindings object for chaining.
071     */
072    public AutoBindings bind(String name, Command cmd) {
073      bindings.put(name, cmd);
074      return this;
075    }
076
077    private void merge(AutoBindings other) {
078      if (other == null) {
079        return;
080      }
081      bindings.putAll(other.bindings);
082    }
083
084    /**
085     * Gets the bindings map.
086     *
087     * @return The bindings map.
088     */
089    HashMap<String, Command> getBindings() {
090      return bindings;
091    }
092  }
093
094  private final TrajectoryCache trajectoryCache = new TrajectoryCache();
095  private final Supplier<Pose2d> poseSupplier;
096  private final Consumer<? extends TrajectorySample<?>> controller;
097  private final BooleanSupplier mirrorTrajectory;
098  private final Subsystem driveSubsystem;
099  private final AutoBindings bindings = new AutoBindings();
100  private final Optional<TrajectoryLogger<? extends TrajectorySample<?>>> trajectoryLogger;
101
102  /**
103   * Its recommended to use the {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory} to create a new instance of this
104   * class.
105   *
106   * @param <SampleType> {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
107   * @param poseSupplier {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
108   * @param controller {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
109   * @param mirrorTrajectory {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
110   * @param driveSubsystem {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
111   * @param bindings {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
112   * @param trajectoryLogger {@link Choreo#createAutoFactory}
113   */
114  public <SampleType extends TrajectorySample<SampleType>> AutoFactory(
115      Supplier<Pose2d> poseSupplier,
116      Consumer<SampleType> controller,
117      BooleanSupplier mirrorTrajectory,
118      Subsystem driveSubsystem,
119      AutoBindings bindings,
120      Optional<TrajectoryLogger<SampleType>> trajectoryLogger) {
121    this.poseSupplier = poseSupplier;
122    this.controller = controller;
123    this.mirrorTrajectory = mirrorTrajectory;
124    this.driveSubsystem = driveSubsystem;
125    this.bindings.merge(bindings);
126    this.trajectoryLogger =
127        trajectoryLogger.map(logger -> (TrajectoryLogger<? extends TrajectorySample<?>>) logger);
128  }
129
130  /**
131   * Creates a new {@link AutoRoutine}.
132   *
133   * @param name The name of the {@link AutoRoutine}.
134   * @return A new {@link AutoRoutine}.
135   * @see #voidRoutine
136   */
137  public AutoRoutine newRoutine(String name) {
138    // Clear cache in simulation to allow a form of "hot-reloading" trajectories
139    if (RobotBase.isSimulation()) {
140      trajectoryCache.clear();
141    }
142
143    return new AutoRoutine(name);
144  }
145
146  /**
147   * An {@link AutoRoutine} that cannot have any side-effects, it stores no state and does nothing
148   * when polled.
149   *
150   * @return A void {@link AutoRoutine}.
151   * @see #newRoutine
152   */
153  public AutoRoutine voidRoutine() {
154    return VOID_ROUTINE;
155  }
156
157  /**
158   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} to be used in an auto routine.
159   *
160   * @param trajectoryName The name of the trajectory to use.
161   * @param routine The {@link AutoRoutine} to register this trajectory under.
162   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
163   */
164  public AutoTrajectory trajectory(String trajectoryName, AutoRoutine routine) {
165    Optional<? extends Trajectory<?>> optTrajectory =
166        trajectoryCache.loadTrajectory(trajectoryName);
167    Trajectory<?> trajectory;
168    if (optTrajectory.isPresent()) {
169      trajectory = optTrajectory.get();
170    } else {
171      DriverStation.reportError("Could not load trajectory: " + trajectoryName, false);
172      trajectory = new Trajectory<SwerveSample>(trajectoryName, List.of(), List.of(), List.of());
173    }
174    return trajectory(trajectory, routine);
175  }
176
177  /**
178   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} to be used in an auto routine.
179   *
180   * @param trajectoryName The name of the trajectory to use.
181   * @param splitIndex The index of the split trajectory to use.
182   * @param routine The {@link AutoRoutine} to register this trajectory under.
183   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
184   */
185  public AutoTrajectory trajectory(
186      String trajectoryName, final int splitIndex, AutoRoutine routine) {
187    Optional<? extends Trajectory<?>> optTrajectory =
188        trajectoryCache.loadTrajectory(trajectoryName, splitIndex);
189    Trajectory<?> trajectory;
190    if (optTrajectory.isPresent()) {
191      trajectory = optTrajectory.get();
192    } else {
193      DriverStation.reportError("Could not load trajectory: " + trajectoryName, false);
194      trajectory = new Trajectory<SwerveSample>(trajectoryName, List.of(), List.of(), List.of());
195    }
196    return trajectory(trajectory, routine);
197  }
198
199  /**
200   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} to be used in an auto routine.
201   *
202   * @param <SampleType> The type of the trajectory samples.
203   * @param trajectory The trajectory to use.
204   * @param routine The {@link AutoRoutine} to register this trajectory under.
205   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
206   */
207  @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
208  public <SampleType extends TrajectorySample<SampleType>> AutoTrajectory trajectory(
209      Trajectory<SampleType> trajectory, AutoRoutine routine) {
210    // type solidify everything
211    final Trajectory<SampleType> solidTrajectory = trajectory;
212    final Consumer<SampleType> solidController = (Consumer<SampleType>) this.controller;
213    final Optional<TrajectoryLogger<SampleType>> solidLogger =
214        this.trajectoryLogger.map(logger -> (TrajectoryLogger<SampleType>) logger);
215    return new AutoTrajectory(
216        trajectory.name(),
217        solidTrajectory,
218        poseSupplier,
219        solidController,
220        mirrorTrajectory,
221        solidLogger,
222        driveSubsystem,
223        routine,
224        bindings);
225  }
226
227  /**
228   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} command to be used in an auto routine.
229   *
230   * <p><b>Important </b>
231   *
232   * <p>{@link #trajectoryCommand} and {@link #trajectory} methods should not be mixed in the same
233   * auto routine. {@link #trajectoryCommand} is used as an escape hatch for teams that don't need
234   * the benefits of the {@link #trajectory} method and its {@link Trigger} API. {@link
235   * #trajectoryCommand} does not invoke bindings added via calling {@link #bind} or {@link
236   * AutoBindings} passed into the factory constructor.
237   *
238   * @param trajectoryName The name of the trajectory to use.
239   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
240   */
241  public Command trajectoryCommand(String trajectoryName) {
242    return trajectory(trajectoryName, VOID_ROUTINE).cmd();
243  }
244
245  /**
246   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} command to be used in an auto routine.
247   *
248   * <p><b>Important </b>
249   *
250   * <p>{@link #trajectoryCommand} and {@link #trajectory} methods should not be mixed in the same
251   * auto routine. {@link #trajectoryCommand} is used as an escape hatch for teams that don't need
252   * the benefits of the {@link #trajectory} method and its {@link Trigger} API. {@link
253   * #trajectoryCommand} does not invoke bindings added via calling {@link #bind} or {@link
254   * AutoBindings} passed into the factory constructor.
255   *
256   * @param trajectoryName The name of the trajectory to use.
257   * @param splitIndex The index of the split trajectory to use.
258   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
259   */
260  public Command trajectoryCommand(String trajectoryName, final int splitIndex) {
261    return trajectory(trajectoryName, splitIndex, VOID_ROUTINE).cmd();
262  }
263
264  /**
265   * Creates a new {@link AutoTrajectory} command to be used in an auto routine.
266   *
267   * <p><b>Important </b>
268   *
269   * <p>{@link #trajectoryCommand} and {@link #trajectory} methods should not be mixed in the same
270   * auto routine. {@link #trajectoryCommand} is used as an escape hatch for teams that don't need
271   * the benefits of the {@link #trajectory} method and its {@link Trigger} API. {@link
272   * #trajectoryCommand} does not invoke bindings added via calling {@link #bind} or {@link
273   * AutoBindings} passed into the factory constructor.
274   *
275   * @param <SampleType> The type of the trajectory samples.
276   * @param trajectory The trajectory to use.
277   * @return A new {@link AutoTrajectory}.
278   */
279  public <SampleType extends TrajectorySample<SampleType>> Command trajectoryCommand(
280      Trajectory<SampleType> trajectory) {
281    return trajectory(trajectory, VOID_ROUTINE).cmd();
282  }
283
284  /**
285   * Creates an {@link AutoRoutine} with the name of the command. The command is the bound to the
286   * routine's enabled trigger. This is useful for adding a {@link Command} composition based auto
287   * to the {@link choreo.auto.AutoChooser}.
288   *
289   * @param cmd The command to bind to the routine.
290   * @return A new auto routine.
291   */
292  public AutoRoutine commandAsAutoRoutine(Command cmd) {
293    AutoRoutine routine = newRoutine(cmd.getName());
294    routine.running().onTrue(cmd);
295    return routine;
296  }
297
298  /**
299   * Binds a command to an event in all trajectories created after this point.
300   *
301   * @param name The name of the trajectory to bind the command to.
302   * @param cmd The command to bind to the trajectory.
303   */
304  public void bind(String name, Command cmd) {
305    bindings.bind(name, cmd);
306  }
307
308  /**
309   * The {@link AutoFactory} caches trajectories with a {@link TrajectoryCache} to avoid reloading
310   * the same trajectory multiple times.
311   *
312   * @return The trajectory cache.
313   */
314  public TrajectoryCache cache() {
315    return trajectoryCache;
316  }
317}
